title: Accounts Assistant
responsibilities: Assist in preparing monthly accounts, financial statements, and management reports.
Perform data entry, bookkeeping, and maintain accurate accounting records.
Able to handle full set of accounts, including invoice verification, payment processing,
billing, collections, ageing analysis, ledger reconciliation, dispute resolution with suppliers
and customers, and the maintenance of complete and accurate accounting records in
compliance with internal controls and accounting standards.
Assist with bank reconciliations, invoice processing, and payment preparation.
Support auditors during annual audit processes.
Maintain proper filing of accounting documents.
Perform other ad-hoc accounting tasks as required.
requirements: Minimum Diploma/Degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field.
At least 1–2 years of working experience in accounting.
Proficient in Microsoft Excel and accounting software (e.g., SQL, Autocount, or equivalent).
Good understanding of basic accounting principles.
Strong attention to detail, organized, and able to meet deadlines.
Good communication skills and ability to work as part of a team.
benefits: Career development in tax and compliance
Located in Bangsar with easy access to public transport

title: Tax Assistant
responsibilities: Assist in preparing tax computations for individuals and companies.
Support the preparation and submission of tax returns (Form BE, B, P, C, etc.).
Ensure compliance with Income Tax Act 1967 and relevant tax regulations.
Maintain proper documentation and filing for tax records and correspondence.
Liaise with LHDN on tax queries, appeals, and follow-ups.
Assist in tax planning, SST matters, and any related advisory tasks.
Support senior tax staff on day-to-day tax assignments.
